response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software developer with broad web, mobile, and some DLang systems experience, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in the resume. Education is a BS in Computer Science with ~13 years of experience (meeting the 8+ year minimum), but the technical experience is not in the relevant hardware/performance architecture domain. There is no evidence of deep neural network optimization, SIMD/MIMD work, or chip-level performance analysis.
strengths: Extensive 13+ year software engineering career with low-latency DLang microservices experience at Dunnhumby
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, and open-source contributions
Some exposure to AI-adjacent work via MCP and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or chip architecture experience
No demonstrated background in AI accelerators, GPU architecture, or DNN training/inference optimization
Career trajectory is web/full-stack focused, not hardware-software co-design or performance architecture

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU architecture background
